name: Temoporfin
description: Temoporfin is an ingredient in the EMA-authorised product Foscan.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Docetaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Cabazitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cabazitaxel is combined with Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Porfimer sodium
interactions.description: Temoporfin may increase the photosensitizing activities of Porfimer sodium.

interactions.name: Verteporfin
interactions.description: Temoporfin may increase the photosensitizing activities of Verteporfin.

interactions.name: Digoxin
interactions.description: Digoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Acetyldigitoxin
interactions.description: Acetyldigitoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Deslanoside
interactions.description: Deslanoside may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Ouabain
interactions.description: Ouabain may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Digitoxin
interactions.description: Digitoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Cymarin
interactions.description: Cymarin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Proscillaridin
interactions.description: Proscillaridin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Metildigoxin
interactions.description: Metildigoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Peruvoside
interactions.description: Peruvoside may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Lanatoside C
interactions.description: Lanatoside C may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Gitoformate
interactions.description: Gitoformate may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Acetyldigoxin
interactions.description: Acetyldigoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Oleandrin
interactions.description: Oleandrin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Digoxin Immune Fab (Ovine)
interactions.description: Digoxin Immune Fab (Ovine) may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Bevacizumab
interactions.description: Bevacizumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.

interactions.name: Cyclophosphamide
interactions.description: Cyclophosphamide may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Temoporfin.
